diagnosis.wrongPath: worker iframe window.Call('Create', {param,input}, opts) with generic me(...dataValues:'valueArray2DValue') wrapper

wrongPathResult.meaning: 添加记录时缺少必要的属性

diagnosis.correctPath: worker-space module helper Ke('Create', req) with fieldValue manually encoded as protobuf keyValueList and valueArray2DValue typed cells
importantDifference: Use imported worker-space helper Ke/aV instead of window.Call for this direct backend record smoke.
Do not let the generic me() helper infer dataValues; build fieldValues[0].dataValues.valueArray2DValue.arrays[0].values explicitly.
Use param.type=3106 because pal_assessment_record is under 历史 -> 业务事.
Keep input.appspacetimeguid when the call is made from worker-space instead of inside a running App backend context.

conclusion: 用户指出的方法问题成立。本次失败不是表未上线，也不是应修改模型属性；失败来自直调封装不对。正确的后端记录插入验证应使用历史业务事记录 Create/Query 的运行库入口和手工 typed protobuf 数据形态。
